overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking through a snowy Japanese temple complex. The character crosses a wooden bridge, passes through a traditional gate, traverses a garden with a five-story pagoda, and enters a wooden temple building.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered wooden bridge leading to temple gate

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across a snow-dusted wooden bridge toward a traditional Japanese gate

notable_agents.action: seated figure in red robes resting by the gate wall

entered.detail: snow-dusted wooden planks with railings on both sides
moss-covered stone wall with wooden fence on top
wooden temple gate with curved tiled roof
leafless winter trees against blue sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wooden bridge dusted with snow, enclosed by railings and a stone wall. The character walks steadily toward a traditional Japanese gate in the distance, passing a seated figure in red robes resting by the wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: open temple garden with pond and five-story pagoda

events.description: passes through wooden gate from enclosed bridge to open garden courtyard
character turns slightly right to follow the garden path toward the pagoda

agents.ego_description: walking through the temple garden following a snow-covered path toward a large pagoda

notable_agents.action: peasant wearing traditional straw cloak walking ahead on the garden path

entered.detail: snow-covered grounds with manicured bushes and trees
tall dark wooden pagoda rising above the garden trees
frozen water feature with snow-covered banks
small arched wooden bridge over the pond
autumn-colored foliage on small garden trees
traditional moss-covered stone lantern along the path

segments.scene_description: Passing through the gate, the scene opens into a wide garden courtyard covered in snow. A five-story pagoda dominates the center background, while the character follows a straw-cloaked peasant along a winding path past yellow-leaved trees and a frozen pond with a red bridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: main temple building entrance with stone steps

events.description: leaves open garden and approaches the main wooden temple structure
character ascends stone steps and enters the dark temple interior

agents.ego_description: walking up stone steps toward the temple entrance and entering the wooden building

notable_agents.action: group of robed temple figures gathered near the entrance steps

entered.detail: large traditional wooden temple with curved roof and open doorway
snow-dusted stone stairs leading to temple entrance
lit torches flanking the temple entrance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the main wooden temple building, leaving the pagoda and pond behind. Several robed figures stand near the entrance as the character walks up the stone steps, passes between lit torches, and enters the dark interior of the temple.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, snow-dusted bridge into the expansive courtyard of a temple complex, finally concluding inside a dark sanctuary. It begins by following the character across a wooden bridge enclosed by stone walls, passing a seated figure in red robes while heading toward a distant traditional gate. As the character passes through the gate, the scene opens into a wide, snowy garden where a five-story pagoda looms in the background and a winding path leads past yellow-leaved trees and a frozen pond. The camera then shifts focus away from the pagoda and pond as the character approaches the main wooden temple building. Finally, the character ascends stone steps between lit torches and passes a group of robed figures before entering the dim interior of the temple.
